Telegraph \u2014 the daily paper.title: Telegraph digest engine (built and run by **The Herald**) — pulls findings from agents, ranks them, generates the paper
Three editions: **Daily** (king), **Brief** (Barry — technical light), **Weekly** (subjects — friendly, inclusive)
Section structure: Front Page (urgent/new), Today's Work (todos), The Long Read (system self-reflection), Arts & Tech (AI/IT news), Classifieds (feedback/requests)
Morning ritual: deliver around 06:00 CAT before the king wakes

The Gekko Standard \u2014 what every vil.section: The Gekko Standard — what every village must meet
The Gekko Standard \u2014 what every vil.title: **Health** — `/health` endpoint returns `healthy` / `degraded` / `unhealthy`; village defines critical vs non-critical dependencies; Capital polls every 10 minutes; uptime tracked over 30 days

The Gekko Standard \u2014 what every vil.section: The Gekko Standard — what every village must meet
The Gekko Standard \u2014 what every vil.title: **Usage** — POST per user action to `/api/track` with `{ app, action, user_oid, timestamp, multiplier, metadata }`; per-action `minutes_saved` configured by king

The Gekko Standard \u2014 what every vil.section: The Gekko Standard — what every village must meet
The Gekko Standard \u2014 what every vil.title: **Auth** — Azure AD (MSAL) for all villages; user identifier = Azure AD `oid`; no village-local user identity tables

The Gekko Standard \u2014 what every vil.section: The Gekko Standard — what every village must meet
The Gekko Standard \u2014 what every vil.title: **Errors** — POST every error to `/api/log-guru/analyze`; include stack-fingerprint for grouping; AI triage runs on schedule (Claude), creates GitHub issues for unique fingerprints

The Gekko Standard \u2014 what every vil.section: The Gekko Standard — what every village must meet
The Gekko Standard \u2014 what every vil.title: **Feedback** — widget in village UI; POSTs to `/api/feedback` *(endpoint to be added)*

The Gekko Standard \u2014 what every vil.title: **Logs** — structured JSON to stdout; collected centrally; matrix view links to per-village log tail

The Gekko Standard \u2014 what every vil.title: **GitHub** — repo registered with kingdom; current deployed tag visible; backups via push to remote

Bigger ideas worth keeping warm.title: **Agentcraft** — orchestration tool for agents; evaluate in `~/Lab/` before adopting; we don't need orchestration yet (Claude Code Desktop is the orchestrator)
**Self-improvement reports from agents** — *"The Herald noticed you haven't read the Long Read in 5 days, want me to make it shorter?"* — the system reflects on its own use and proposes changes

**Three-edition Telegraph** — Daily for king (full depth), Brief for Barry (technical-light, AI news, no todo list), Weekly for subjects (friendly, inclusive, "here's what we built for you, here's what's coming")

**AI-triaged error groups → GitHub issues** — every unique error fingerprint becomes one issue with category, priority, effort, root-cause hypothesis, suggested fix. Goal: under 100 errors/week before adding Telegram alerts on errors.

**The "newspaper" reading experience** — sit down with coffee, read what matters, never feel behind. Front page → urgent. Long read → reflection. Back pages → AI/IT news. Classifieds → feedback/requests.

**Documentation system** — long-term goal: every village has registered docs in Copilot Studio corpus; archived projects (D-2510-004, D-2511-002) link to current versions; The Maester answers historical questions
**Time-saved as the platform's killer metric** — "This month, 4 users saved 67 hours across 6 apps." Per-action `minutes_saved` configured by king. Multipliers supported.
**The Bookkeeper / The Diplomat / future agents** — as the kingdom grows, hire new agents for new beats

**Sire, your agenda for Thursday, 30 April 2026.**

🔴 **0** matters of the highest priority.   🟡 **26** of medium.   🟢 **16** lesser.   💡 **9** ideas warm.
